meta.title: Become a Trainer — WAHM
meta.description: Share your expertise with the world. Join WAHM: international audience, recurring revenue, full support. Submit your application.

hero.label: Become a WAHM trainer
hero.title: Share your expertise with the world
hero.subtitle: Let's give online training a new dimension together. Your knowledge deserves a worldwide audience.

avantages.label: Why join us
avantages.title: Become a key player in a global platform
avantages.intro: By joining World Academy of Human Movement, you become a key player in a global platform bringing together the best trainers in health, wellness, coaching and performance. WAHM lets you:

items.title: Reach an international audience
items.desc: Your course becomes accessible in several languages to thousands of learners in over 50 countries.

items.title: Generate recurring revenue
items.desc: Each course becomes a digital asset that earns you money every month, with no geographic limit.

items.title: Strengthen your reputation
items.desc: Being selected by WAHM is a mark of prestige. Your credibility increases. Your visibility skyrockets.

items.title: Create without technical constraints
items.desc: You provide the content. We handle hosting, worldwide distribution, translation and subtitles, marketing, and pedagogical support.

items.title: Join a collective of international experts
items.desc: Join a teaching elite who share the same values: excellence, innovation, transmission.

highlight.title: Teach the whole world. Leave a lasting mark.
highlight.text1: WAHM is not just a platform: it's an ecosystem of experts where the best share their knowledge with the greatest number.
highlight.text2: Do you have unique knowledge? Give it the reach it deserves.

disciplines.label: Who WAHM is for
disciplines.title: Disciplines we're looking for
disciplines.subtitle: We select recognized trainers in the following fields:
disciplines.outro: If you're pushing your discipline forward, WAHM wants to work with you.

criteres.label: Our selection criteria
criteres.title: Ensuring excellence
criteres.subtitle: We choose trainers who are:
criteres.imageAlt: WAHM team evaluating a trainer candidate
items: With clear, structured and impactful teaching skills
Able to bring real added value

etapes.label: How it works
etapes.title: Five steps, supported from start to finish
etapes.outro: Supported from start to finish, with no revenue cap.

items.title: Our committee evaluates your proposal
items.desc: Teaching quality, relevance, originality, added value.

items.title: We help you structure the course
items.desc: Storyboard, modules, materials, filming if needed.

items.title: WAHM takes care of everything
items.desc: Publishing, marketing, worldwide distribution, user support.

items.title: You get paid every month
items.desc: Transparent, growing revenue, with no cap.

candidature.label: Trainer application
candidature.title: Your expertise deserves a worldwide audience
candidature.text: Join the best experts in human movement. International audience, recurring revenue, full support.
candidature.formSubtitle: We review your profile and get back to you within 7 days.

success.title: Application sent!
success.text: Thank you. Our committee is reviewing your profile and will get back to you within 7 days at the address provided.

placeholders.bio: A few lines about your background and approach…

form.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by the WAHM team.

errors.invalid: Please fill in at least your name, a valid email and your field of expertise.
errors.failed: Sending failed. Please try again later or write to us directly.
errors.network: Sending failed. Check your connection and try again.
